hero.headline: *Power problems?* We fix them fast
hero.subheadline: Licensed Greenville electricians who show up on time and get it done right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every wire, outlet, and panel
services_section.subheading: Professional electrical services for your home and business

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Old panel can't handle modern demands? We install new electrical panels that keep up with your power needs.

services.title: Outlet Installation
services.description: Need more outlets or upgrading to GFCI? We wire new outlets anywhere you need power.

services.title: Lighting Solutions
services.description: From ceiling fans to under-cabinet lights, we handle all your lighting installation and repairs.

services.title: Electrical Repairs
services.description: Flickering lights, dead outlets, or breakers that keep tripping? We diagnose and fix electrical problems.

about.heading: Greenville's go-to electrical team
about.body: We're a local Greenville electrical contractor that shows up when we say we will. One call, real people answering.

reviews.name: Dylan N.
reviews.text: Had them install a new panel in my house. Did a great job.

reviews.name: Jaime L.
reviews.text: They were on time, reasonably priced, and got the job done.

cta.heading: Need an electrician? Let's talk
